name: manage_line_items
description: Create, update, or delete line items (ad groups) within a campaign. Line items define the bid, optimization goal, placement, and schedule for a set of promoted creatives. Each line item belongs to one campaign and can have its own targeting criteria.

parameters.name: campaign_id
parameters.description: The ID of the parent campaign.

parameters.name: objective
parameters.description: The line item objective. Options: AWARENESS, ENGAGEMENTS, VIDEO_VIEWS, WEBSITE_CLICKS, APP_INSTALLS, FOLLOWERS.

parameters.name: bid_amount_local_micro
parameters.description: Bid amount in micros of the account currency.

parameters.name: placements
parameters.description: Where the ads should appear. Options: ALL_ON_TWITTER, TWITTER_TIMELINE, TWITTER_PROFILE, TWITTER_SEARCH.

parameters.name: entity_status
parameters.description: Line item status. Options: ACTIVE, PAUSED, DRAFT.
